sglang.title: [dist] made timeout configurable
sglang.author: FrankLeeeee
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Loading dpsk model can take a long time, leading to nccl timeout as stated in #3784
Modifications
This PR added the server argumetn --dist-timeout to configure the global timeout duration.

sglang.title: Fix allgather ops inside cuda graphs
sglang.author: nvcastet
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #3424
TLDR:
sglang uses pynccl or their customalllreduce instead of pytorch ProcessGroup when graph capturing.
Allgather in sglang code base directly uses pytorch allgather instead of the sglang abstraction to decide which implementation to pick. Allgather is used in DP-attention and also to g

vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
While doing some testing with xgrammar, I ran into an supported
attribute for a string type. I checked the code and found some things
we weren't checking for.
Details can be found by searching for warnUnsupportedKeywords in
this file:
https://github.com/mlc-ai/xgrammar/blob/main/cpp/json_schema_conv

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Modify modelscope api usage in transformer_utils
vllm.author: shen-shanshan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
What this PR does?
Modify modelscope api usage in transformer_utils.
Find more details at this issue in modelscope.
This _try_login() has been removed, now you just need code below:
from modelscope.hub.api import HubApi
api = HubApi()
api.login(token)
If token is None, this method will not throw, if

vllm.title: [misc] Clean up ray compiled graph type hints
vllm.author: ruisearch42
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Update the type hints so that they are accurate.

vllm.title: [Feature] Support KV cache offloading and disagg prefill with LMCache connector.
vllm.author: YaoJiayi
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
LMCache (https://github.com/LMCache/LMCache/tree/dev) uses the kv_transfer interface to support both KV cache offloading and disagg prefill.
The original interfaces recv_kv_caches_and_hidden_states and send_kv_caches_and_hidden_states in kv_connector are used as wrappers to call lmcache_retrieve_kv

vllm.title: [ROCm][Quantization][Kernel] Using HIP FP8 header
vllm.author: gshtras
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Using the official hip fp8 header supplied with ROCm instead of a custom one. The header exists since ROCm6.2
It abstracts away the usage of either hardware instructions, or software emulation for fp8 conversions, as well as both NANOO and OCP types

Background
The --model option (no need in vllm serve) accepts either a Hugging Face (HF) repo ID or a local path. Currently, two confusing scenarios occur:


Local Path:
When a non-existent local path (e.g., "/xxx/xxx") is provided, an error is raised at this line. The error message,
HFValidationErr

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Initialize attention bias on the same device as Query/Key/Value
vllm.author: edwardzjl
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The attention bias in vLLM's xformers backend is currently initialized on the default device, rather than the device of the Q/K/V tensors:

  
    
      vllm/vllm/attention/backends/xformers.py
    
    
        Lines 676 to 677
      in
      b53d799

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Flush TunableOp results before worker processes are destroyed.
vllm.author: naromero77amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is a bug fix for users that run TunableOp on multi-GPU vLLM workloads. This is mostly ROCm users.
Currently, TunableOp with worker processes enabled will only write the results for GPU 0 from the main process. Normally, the TunableOp results are flushed to the file system when the TunableOp

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix deepseek-vl2 inference with more than 2 images
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #13396 (link existing issues this PR will resolve)

Deepseek-vl2 will crop image to (image_size, image_size) instead of select_best_resolution when num_images>2

vllm.title: Fix `/v1/audio/transcriptions ` Bad Request Error
vllm.author: HermitSun
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
As mentioned in #13757, when creating a request to the audio transcription endpoint, a 400 error occurs.
I found that the previous code used FastAPI’s Form Models feature, which has been supported since FastAPI version 0.113.0. However, the version of FastAPI specified in requirements.txt is:

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Revert inspection code in #13743
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The model inspection code in #13743 causes infinite recursion when called in a plugin because inspecting the model in another subprocess loads all general plugins in that subprocess as well.

vllm.title: Fix string parsing error
vllm.author: Chen-0210
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix s string parsing error caused by #13724
before
ValueError: Invalid repository ID or local directory specified: '{model}'.
after
ValueError: Invalid repository ID or local directory specified: '/home/model-does-not-exist'.

As part of the effort in supporting vLLM V1 architecture for neuron backend (#11152), this PR intent to support activation, layernorm, rotary_embedding and logits_processor as a variant of existing modules that derive from CustomOp class.
These changes are tested in individual test cases that are po

vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Balances memory usage across pipeline ranks by reducing the amount used on all ranks that are not the last rank.

vllm.title: Improve pipeline partitioning
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
As discussed in https://vllm-dev.slack.com/archives/C08AD2B5HH8/p1740503158346139
If the number of layers is not divisible by the number of partitions, the remaining layers are evenly distributed across all but the last partition. The last partition is excluded because it often contains an additiona

vllm.title: [ROCm] Disable chunked prefill/prefix caching when running MLA on non-cuda platforms
vllm.author: SageMoore
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
flash_attn_varlen_func in upstream flash-attn does not support the return_softmax_lse argument. This PR works around that issue by explicitly disabling chunked prefill and prefix caching on non-cuda platforms.
Here are the results from running llmeval with deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite-Instruct

vllm.title: [v0][Core] Use xgrammar shared context to avoid copy overhead for offline engine
vllm.author: sethkimmel3
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The deepcopy introduced in #11637 adds a lot of overhead when adding a large number of requests to an llm_engine. This adds a more efficient method of copying the XGrammarLogitsProcessor data structure to remove that overhead.
cc: @mgoin @aarnphm

vllm.title: [Misc] Improve LoRA spelling

vllm.title: [Misc] Fix input processing for Ultravox
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix input processing for Ultravox so that the prompt_token_ids are consistent for both online and offline inference.
This PR also updates test model to be using Ultravox v0.4 due to recent v0.5 update breaking processor test.
